llm_verdict.message:
The remediation has been successfully applied. The kernel parameter `net.ipv6.conf.default.accept_redirects` is set to 0 at runtime, and a persistent configuration file `/etc/sysctl.d/99-ipv6-redirects.conf` has been created with the correct setting. Both the runtime and persistent configurations have been verified.

The system is now compliant with the OpenSCAP rule `sysctl_net_ipv6_conf_default_accept_redirects`. No further actions are required.

reasoning_messages.content:
The remediation has been successfully applied. The kernel parameter `net.ipv6.conf.default.accept_redirects` is set to 0 at runtime, and a persistent configuration file `/etc/sysctl.d/99-ipv6-redirects.conf` has been created with the correct setting. Both the runtime and persistent configurations have been verified.

The system is now compliant with the OpenSCAP rule `sysctl_net_ipv6_conf_default_accept_redirects`. No further actions are required.
